description.initial: The southern reaches of the desert are harsher still, with less vegetation and more exposed rock. The dunes here are lower but more numerous, creating a confusing landscape of endless repetition. Without the stars to guide you, navigation would be nearly impossible.
description.return: The southern desert. Rocky and barren, testing all who cross it.
description.atmospheric: The sun beats down mercilessly. Not a single cloud offers respite.

west.blockedMessage: The western desert is impassable. Your path lies elsewhere.

interactables.name: Exposed Rock
interactables.examineText: Ancient bedrock shows through the sand here, dark stone worn smooth by millennia of wind and sand. It's hot to the touch.
